network_summary: All 4 locations are Illinois offices of 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' (DPIL), the well-documented Heartland Dental friendly-PC used in Illinois to comply with the state's Corporate Practice of Dentistry (CPOM) prohibition. Heartland Dental is the largest DSO in the US, majority-owned by KKR since 2018. Belinda Huerta is listed as 'CREDENTIALING COORDINATOR' on all 4 NPPES records — she is a Heartland Dental administrative/credentialing staff member, NOT a dentist-owner. The AO cluster is an administrative artifact of centralized Heartland NPPES credentialing, not an independent owner's multi-location footprint. All 4 locations are already classified dso_national/Heartland Dental/KKR in the project database.
owner_operator_identity: Heartland Dental LLC (DSO platform/MSO), majority-owned by KKR since April 2018; Ontario Teachers' Pension Plan minority partner. Belinda Huerta is the credentialing coordinator who signed NPPES filings — not the beneficial owner.
legal_entities: Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C. (Illinois PC — Heartland friendly-PC, CPOM-compliant shell)
Heartland Dental LLC (DSO/MSO platform, Effingham IL)
durable_artifacts: All 4 NPIs registered under 'DENTAL PROFESSIONALS OF ILLINOIS, P.C.' — Heartland Dental's documented Illinois friendly-PC name used across its IL footprint
Authorized official BELINDA HUERTA title = 'CREDENTIALING COORDINATOR' across all 4 NPIs — administrative/credentialing role, not owner
All 4 practice_locations rows carry affiliated_dso='Heartland Dental' and affiliated_pe_sponsor='KKR' in project DB
AO cluster spans 4 distinct Chicagoland ZIPs: 60015, 60185, 60431, 60586 — consistent with Heartland's centralized IL credentialing operation
entity_classification = dso_national on all 4 location rows (already confirmed corporate)
mso_platform_pe_evidence: KKR acquired majority interest in Heartland Dental LLC in April 2018 (confirmed: https://www.globenewswire.com/news-release/2018/04/30/1490372/0/en/Heartland-Dental-and-KKR-Finalize-Majority-Interest-Deal.html). Heartland Dental is the nation's largest DSO with 1,900+ offices in 39 states, providing non-clinical management services to supported dental PCs including 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' under a Management Services Agreement. DSO profile: https://heartland.com/about-us/
stale_closed_false_positive_notes: IMPORTANT FALSE-POSITIVE FLAG: Belinda Huerta is NOT a beneficial owner or dentist. She is a 'CREDENTIALING COORDINATOR' — a Heartland Dental administrative employee responsible for filing/maintaining NPPES records for the Heartland-managed DPIL locations. The AO cluster is a credentialing artifact, not an ownership network. The real operator is Heartland Dental LLC (KKR-backed). This cluster should NOT be treated as a dentist_multi or independent owner network in any downstream analysis.
evidence_chain: AO signal: BELINDA HUERTA listed as authorized official on 4 NPPES org-NPI records (NPIs 1013632801, 1902688500, 1851971642, 1366227241) across 4 Chicagoland ZIPs, all under the legal name 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' -> Federal record check: authorized_official_title = 'CREDENTIALING COORDINATOR' on all 4 practices rows -> Documentary corroboration: 'Dental Professionals of Illinois, P.C.' is Heartland Dental's documented Illinois CPOM-compliant friendly-PC (confirmed by project DB affiliated_dso + affiliated_pe_sponsor fields, D&B profile, and UIC DSCC directory listing) -> PE evidence: KKR majority acquisition of Heartland Dental LLC finalized April 2018 (GlobeNewswire press release) -> Conclusion: these are already-classified dso_national Heartland Dental locations; the AO is a credentialing staff artifact, not an owner signal.
future_app_notes: No further investigation needed — all 4 locations are confirmed Heartland Dental / KKR, already classified dso_national in the DB. Downstream gate should note that Belinda Huerta AO clusters across any other IL ZIPs should be auto-resolved as Heartland Dental credentialing artifacts without additional research. If new DPIL NPIs appear with Huerta as AO, classify dso_national/Heartland automatically.
